panel.title: Accessibility Preferences
panel.description: Adjust your viewing preferences. This panel offers personal preference controls in addition to the site's structural accessibility.
panel.disclaimer: This panel provides user preference controls; structural accessibility is built into the site itself.

focusRing.title: Enhanced Focus Ring
focusRing.description: Show keyboard focus with a prominent 4px blue ring.

dyslexiaFont.title: Dyslexia-Friendly Font
dyslexiaFont.note: Some readers prefer this; research has not shown universal benefit.
